name: components/theme
description: A context provider that manages the global theme configuration (base radius, color tokens, etc.) for the shadcn-solid design system. Exposes a reactive ThemeContext with theme state and a setTheme updater, and persists preferences to localStorage via a configurable storageKey. All other components consume this context to resolve dynamic class names and CSS variable values.
useCases: Wrapping the application root to supply theme tokens to every downstream component
Runtime theme customization panels where users adjust border radius or accent colors
SSR hydration safety by reading persisted preferences from localStorage on mount
Multi-tenant white-label apps that switch entire color palettes without page reload
